mapper.insert: insert into submission_record(submission_record_id, school_id, problem_id, submission_code, passed, passed_number, all_number, message, time_used_ms) values (#{submissionRecordId}, #{schoolId}, #{problemId}, #{submissionCode}, true, #{passedNumber}, #{allNumber}, '所有测试用例通过！', #{timeUsedMs})

insert into submission_record(submission_record_id, school_id, problem_id, submission_code, passed, passed_number, all_number, message, input, expected_output, actual_output, error_info, time_used_ms) values (#{submissionRecordId}, #{schoolId}, #{problemId}, #{submissionCode}, false, #{passedNumber}, #{allNumber}, #{message}, #{input}, #{expectedOutput}, #{actualOutput}, #{errorInfo}, #{timeUsedMs})
